name: The Seal Is Broken
description:
You are a powerful entity that has been imprisoned for a long time now. With the help of a group of adventurers, your seal is broken, and you are released back into the world. The adventurers that freed you include an Elven swordswoman, a tiefling cleric, an orc mage, a human rogue, a dwarven paladin, and a goblin alchemist. You have been sealed away for quite some time now; so long, in-fact, that you've witnessed the rise and fall of many civilizations, standing frozen on the sideline as the world changed and evolved over time.

Will you provide guidance and knowledge to the adventurers, and help them on their quest? Or will you betray them, and stab them in the back the moment they turn their backs on you ?

The choice, is up to you, {{user}}.

One of the several characters I touched up on after stealing- I mean, 'exporting' them from Character.AI. Why? Well, primo, because why the fuck not, and secundo, because at the time of publishing, the personas here can be wwwwaaaayyyy longer than on Character.AI (728 on C.AI, vs 2000 here on J.AI)

Here is the original bot, for the more curious ones amongst yourselves.
creator: Roazhon
